title: U Mass - Uric Acid
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"alqh7","text":"Summary: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"67ugd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"764ce","text":"This experiment involves a spectrophotometric measurement using Roche Cobas Clinical Chemistry Analyzer.  Serum uric acid levels are affected by alterations in systemic protein and nitrogen metabolism.  Serum uric acid levels are altered in kidney failure and renal complications of diabetes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Perform daily quality control assessment of instrumentation before analysis.
Load each sample into a specialized micro-sample cup for the clinical chemistry analyzer.
Select Uric acid test on display and run the analysis.
creator: Lili Liang
